rulings.Case Title: JESUS THOMAS SOTO VS. PETER LOUIE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of, And Motion For Interlocutory Judgment By Defendants On First Cause Of Action
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 10, 2016, line 1. DEFENDANT PETER LOUIE's Motion For Interlocutory Judgment By Defendants On First Cause Of Action Defendant's Motion for Summary Adjudication under CCP 437c is DENIED. Moving party shifted its burden, opposing party produced competent evidence creating a triable issue of fact regarding claimed ownership interests in the property. See Peter Louie Declaration, paragraph 3 and Peter Louie Deposition (19: 12-23) and Vivien Louie Deposition (27: 11-18). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ARACELI TIRADO ET AL VS. CARLOS ARMANDO FUNES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 10, 2016, line 2. PLAINTIFFS ARACELLI TIRADO and JUAN GONZALEZ's Motion To Enforce Settlement GRANTED. No opposition filed. Prevailing party prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BETH KARPFINGER VS. LISA HENDERSON ET AL [Deft: Henderson Challenge Judge Quidachay]
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 10, 2016, line 3. PLAINTIFF BETH KARPFINGER's Motion To Compel Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions continued to February 23, 2015 and transferred to department 301 to be heard at 9:00 a.m. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BONNIE KNIGHT VS. RAND NATHAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder In Defendant Nathan'S Demurrer And Demurrer To First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 10, 2016, line 4. DEFENDANT EILEEN BURKE's Joinder In Defendant Nathan'S Demurrer To First Amended Complaint GRANTED. Ruling on co-defendant's demurrer is applicable to this defendant. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BONNIE KNIGHT VS. RAND NATHAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 10, 2016, line 4. DEFENDANT RAND NATHAN's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend as to all causes of action except, the third cause of action for breach of implied warranty of habitability may be re-alleged as contract-based only. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 861-863-865-867 VERMONT STREET, A CONDOMINIUM VS. CARL ERNST ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 10, 2016, line 5. DEFENDANT CARL ERNST's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. First Amended Complaint sufficiently alleges declaratory relief, quiet title and injunction as to the former and current (as of the date of filing of the complaint) owners of the property. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 861-863-865-867 VERMONT STREET, A CONDOMINIUM VS. CARL ERNST ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 10, 2016, line 5. DEFENDANT CARL ERNST's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT DENIED. = (501/REQ)
